nasb.text: And he was talking and arguing with the Hellenistic Jews; but they were attempting to put him to death.

esv.text: And he spoke and disputed against the Hellenists. But they were seeking to kill him.

cnv.text: 並且與講希臘話的猶太人談論辯駁，那些人卻想下手殺他。

ccb.text: 他常常跟那些讲希腊话的犹太人辩论，于是他们打算杀掉他。

csbs.text: 他对那些说希腊语的犹太人讲道，与他们辩论；他们却图谋要杀了他。
